film.title: Hellbenders
film.overview: An exorcism comedy which follows the Order of Hellbound Saints (Brooklyn Parish), a highly secretive and profoundly blasphemous men of God, as they battle demonic forces too terrible to be cast out by traditional Vatican-approved methods.

dialogues.dialogue: Exorcise this piece of s**t.  In the name of the power of creation commands you.  In the name of God... Flee in shameful defeat from the word made flesh.  Flee in shameful defeat from the word made flesh.  Fall and be judged in fire.

In the name of the power of creation commands you.  In the name of God... Flee in shameful defeat from the word made flesh.  Flee in shameful defeat from the word made flesh.  Fall and be judged in fire.  Take off the collar.

You? You're more damnation ready than me?  Yes, sure I am. How do you figure?  I mean, look, gluttony, wrath, pride.  You're pretty solid, but you've got one count... One count of lust.  One count of lust.
